title: Copper Armor Netherite Style
description: Replaces Netherite coloring with that of Copper
body:
Replaces Netherite coloring with that of Copper

Have you ever wanted your netherite armor to have the color scheme of copper? This pack will make you feel stronger in all of your fights.

Matching tools https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copper-tools-netherite-style

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
